历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12238 → 14420 → 16442 → 16864 → 12651. From 2021 to 2024, it continuously shifted backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4626 places. In 2025, it rebounded significantly to 12651, moving forward by about 4213 places compared to 2024, showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 12651. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 17 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 19 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15, a reduction of about 21% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 47–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (vice dean dismissed for extramarital affair during marriage, mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag), which may somewhat suppress candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, rated as average, without high attention. Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with outstanding strength in normal (teacher training) disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Energy and Power (recommended) and other Physics Category-related majors have continuously rising social popularity. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 209,000, with Physics Category accounting for approximately 65%, estimated at about 136,000, basically unchanged from 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a provincial university. Chongqing candidates generally have a good regional preference for the Yangtze River Delta universities, but the university's enrollment scale in Chongqing is small (19 in 2025), making the regional factor neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan reduction of about 21% intensifying competition (ranking forward), negative reputation events possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm (ranking backward), and the continuously rising popularity of Physics Category-related majors (ranking forward), the enrollment reduction effect dominates. Combining the above factors with fine-tuning, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 10973, with a range of 10473–11473.
